items.title_en: Carney says Alberta is 'essential' to Canada as province plans vote on separation
items.title_zh: 卡尼表示艾伯塔省对加拿大“至关重要”，因为该省计划就分离进行投票
items.desc_en: Alberta's decision to hold a referendum on separation has been widely criticised, including the separatists who say the question is not definitive enough.
items.desc_zh: 艾伯塔省就分离问题举行公投的决定受到了广泛批评，其中包括分离主义者，他们认为这个问题不够明确。

items.title_en: Qualcomm's stock pop shows investors are 'waking up' to boom in AI devices
items.title_zh: 高通的股价上涨表明投资者正在“觉醒”到人工智能设备的繁荣
items.desc_en: Qualcomm is on a big run, powered by investor bullishness that the company will be at the center of a boom in AI devices.
items.desc_zh: 投资者看好高通公司将成为人工智能设备繁荣的中心，这推动了高通公司的发展。

items.title_en: Gaza flotilla activists allege abuse by Israeli forces while detained
items.title_zh: 加沙船队活动人士声称以色列军队在被拘留期间实施虐待行为
items.desc_en: The detainees say they were slapped, hit, humiliated and even subjected to sexual violence, but Israel's prison service says the allegations are false.
items.desc_zh: 被拘留者称，他们遭到掌掴、殴打、羞辱，甚至遭受性暴力，但以色列监狱部门表示，这些指控是虚假的。

items.title_en: Judge dismisses criminal case against Kilmar Abrego Garcia
items.title_zh: 法官驳回针对基尔马·阿布雷戈·加西亚的刑事案件
items.desc_en: A federal judge says the Maryland man who was wrongfully deported last year is being prosecuted for political reasons.
items.desc_zh: 一名联邦法官表示，去年被错误驱逐出境的马里兰州男子因政治原因而受到起诉。

items.title_en: Two top Walmart executives leave company under new CEO John Furner
items.title_zh: 沃尔玛两名高管在新任首席执行官约翰·弗纳 (John Furner) 的领导下离开公司
items.desc_en: The chief operating officer of Walmart's warehouse Sam's Club, Tom Ward, is retiring while Walmart's EVP of store operations, Cedric Clark, is leaving.
items.desc_zh: 沃尔玛仓库山姆会员店的首席运营官汤姆·沃德 (Tom Ward) 即将退休，而沃尔玛商店运营执行副总裁塞德里克·克拉克 (Cedric Clark) 也将离职。

items.title_en: Tulsi Gabbard to resign as US director of national intelligence
items.title_zh: 图尔西·加巴德辞去美国国家情报总监职务
items.desc_en: Gabbard who has been largely out of public view during recent US operations says she is leaving due to her husband's illness.

items.desc_en: Ukraine said it hit Russia's elite Rubicon drone military unit in a Moscow-occupied part of eastern Ukraine.

items.desc_en: Disney's "Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu" tallied $12 million in Thursday night previews, the lowest collection of advanced tickets in franchise history.
items.desc_zh: 迪士尼的《星球大战：曼达洛人和格罗古》在周四晚上的预演中票房收入为 1200 万美元，这是该系列电影历史上预售门票收入最低的一次。

items.title_en: Consumer sentiment hits fresh record low in May as Iran war fuels inflation worries
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争加剧通胀担忧，五月消费者信心创历史新低
items.desc_en: Consumer sentiment has tumbled to a fresh record low in May as fears of higher prices grow due to the U.S.-Iran war and elevated oil prices.
items.desc_zh: 由于美伊战争和油价上涨，人们对价格上涨的担忧加剧，5 月份消费者信心跌至历史新低。

items.title_zh: 小唐纳德·特朗普支持的“类固醇奥运会”将于周日举行。这是值得期待的
items.desc_en: Olympic medallists are among 42 athletes competing in the controversial competition, but the Enhanced Games has big product plans beyond the event this weekend.
items.desc_zh: 42 名运动员参加了这项备受争议的比赛，其中包括奥运会奖牌得主，但增强型运动会在本周末的赛事之外还有大型产品计划。

items.title_en: An Indian bride dies. Rival claims of murder and suicide set off media frenzy
items.title_zh: 一名印度新娘去世。谋杀和自杀的相互指控引发了媒体的狂热
items.desc_en: Twisha Sharma, a model and actor, had been married for just five months when she was found dead.
items.desc_zh: 模特兼演员特威莎·夏尔马 (Twisha Sharma) 被发现死亡时，她刚刚结婚五个月。

items.title_en: Trump said he'd 'remember' companies that didn't apply for tariff refunds. Many of them are anyway
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，他会“记住”未申请关税退款的公司。无论如何，他们中的许多人
items.desc_en: Walmart confirmed to CNBC it has sought a tariff refund and plans to use any money it receives back to invest in lower prices for shoppers.
items.desc_zh: 沃尔玛向 CNBC 证实，它已寻求关税退款，并计划将收到的任何资金用于为购物者提供更低的价格。

items.title_en: AI used to fake evidence that ended Korean actor's career, say police
items.title_zh: 警方称人工智能曾伪造证据结束韩国演员的职业生涯
items.desc_en: Police are seeking an arrest warrant for a YouTuber who allegedly fabricated evidence to defame actor Kim Soo-hyun.
items.desc_zh: 警方正在对一名涉嫌伪造证据诽谤演员金秀贤的 YouTuber 寻求逮捕令。

items.title_en: Slow Food founder Carlo Petrini dies aged 76
items.title_zh: 慢食创始人卡洛·佩特里尼 (Carlo Petrini) 去世，享年 76 岁
items.desc_en: Petrini's movement rejected fast food to promote sustainable production and traditional cooking.
items.desc_zh: 佩特里尼的运动拒绝快餐，提倡可持续生产和传统烹饪。

items.title_en: Nota: AI Notes & Voice
items.title_zh: Nota: AI Notes & Voice
items.desc_en: Turn voice, scans, sketches, and text into notes with AI
items.desc_zh: 利用 AI 将语音、扫描、草图和文本转化为笔记

items.title_en: Elon Musk's SpaceX postpones Starship launch
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 推迟了星际飞船的发射
items.desc_en: It comes just a day after the firm revealed plans for a record-breaking stock market debut.
items.desc_zh: 就在一天前，该公司公布了破纪录的股票上市计划。

items.title_en: US to send 5,000 more troops to Poland, Trump says
items.title_zh: 特朗普称美国将向波兰增派5000名士兵
items.desc_en: The announcement comes a week after the Pentagon cancelled a planned deployment of 4,000 troops to the country.
items.desc_zh: 一周前，五角大楼取消了向该国部署 4000 名士兵的计划。

items.title_zh: 爱如实：约会初创公司承诺减少作弊行为
items.desc_en: Frustration with fake dating profiles has spurred new dating services with different approaches.
items.desc_zh: 对虚假约会资料的失望催生了采用不同方法的新约会服务。

items.title_en: UK police bosses urge unsafe platforms to be blocked for under-16s
items.title_zh: 英国警察局长敦促封锁 16 岁以下青少年的不安全平台
items.desc_en: The NCA and NPCC say children should be blocked from accessing sites which do not stop them seeing nudes or being contacted by strangers.
items.desc_zh: NCA 和 NPCC 表示，应该阻止儿童访问不能阻止他们看到裸体或与陌生人联系的网站。

items.title_en: Meta settles social media addiction case with US school district
items.title_zh: Meta 与美国学区解决社交媒体成瘾案
items.desc_en: The trial had been set as a test case for 1200 other school districts making similar claims.
items.desc_zh: 该审判已被定为其他 1200 个做出类似主张的学区的测试案例。

items.desc_en: Iran publishes a map claiming "armed forces oversight" across more than 22,000 sq km of the waterway.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗发布了一张地图，声称“武装部队监督”了超过22,000平方公里的水道。

items.title_en: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says Ofcom
items.title_zh: Ofcom 表示 TikTok 和 YouTube 对儿童来说“不够安全”
items.desc_en: YouTube said it worked with experts to provide appropriate experiences. TikTok said it was disappointed Ofcom had not acknowledged its safety features.
items.desc_zh: YouTube 表示，它与专家合作提供适当的体验。 TikTok 表示，对于 Ofcom 没有承认其安全功能感到失望。

items.title_en: SpaceX files for IPO that could make Elon Musk a trillionaire
items.title_zh: SpaceX 申请 IPO 可能使埃隆·马斯克成为万亿富翁
items.desc_en: Musk's rocket-maker and satellite internet provider will trade under the ticker SPCX
items.desc_zh: 马斯克的火箭制造商和卫星互联网提供商将以股票代码 SPCX 进行交易

items.desc_zh: 没有媒体的社交网络

items.title_en: US groups urge investigation into child safety and spending on Roblox
items.title_zh: 美国团体敦促对儿童安全和 Roblox 支出进行调查
items.desc_en: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.
items.desc_zh: Roblox 表示，它有“明确的政策”禁止实际和模拟赌博，以及管理付费随机项目的规则。

items.title_en: Google to release first smart glasses since Google Glass flop
items.title_zh: 谷歌将推出自谷歌眼镜失败以来首款智能眼镜
items.desc_en: The glasses will go on sale sometime in autumn and allow Google's artificial intelligence product to interact with a user.
items.desc_zh: 这款眼镜将于秋季某个时候上市销售，让谷歌的人工智能产品能够与用户互动。

items.title_zh: Zoe Kleinman：为什么人工智能行业是马斯克-奥特曼试验的真正赢家
items.desc_en: The trial in Oakland, California has helped lift the veil on the AI sector - and the huge egos of the men at the heart of it.
items.desc_zh: 加利福尼亚州奥克兰的试验揭开了人工智能领域的面纱，以及该领域核心人物的巨大自负。

items.title_en: Robo-top: The machines that could make your next t-shirt
items.title_zh: Robo-top：可以为你制作下一件 T 恤的机器
items.desc_en: Most clothes are made in Asia, but new machines could bring some of that work back to the West.
items.desc_zh: 大多数衣服都是在亚洲制造的，但新机器可以将部分工作带回西方。

items.title_en: Elon Musk just lost another lawsuit. Will he keep fighting?
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克刚刚又输掉了另一场官司。他会继续战斗吗？
items.desc_en: Musk's loss against OpenAI is the latest in a string of courtroom defeats.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克输给 OpenAI 是一系列法庭失败中的最新一起。
